metadata.title: Pound Current Account | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Pound Current Account is based on Qard contract where the Bank is liable to pay your money back on demand. The Bank can use these funds for investment and other purposes. This account allows you the peace of mind of having your money safely deposited with an Islamic bank with the additional assurance that the Bank is not investing your money in activities that contravene Shariah principles.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Pound Current Account Open a Pound Current Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Key Features Free Chequebook No charges on issuance of chequebook Prior Notice Withdrawals of above £500 needs 1 day prior notice Minimum Deposit Minimum deposit required to open an account is £100 Foreign Remittances Receive Foreign Remittances Routine Withdrawals Routine withdrawals up to £500 per day allowed without prior intimation No Deductions No deduction of service charges if the balance maintained is low How the Pound Account Works Download Fatwa Meezan Pound Current Account is based on Qard contract where the Bank is liable to pay your money back on demand. The Bank can use these funds for investment and other purposes. This account allows you the peace of mind of having your money safely deposited with an Islamic bank with the additional assurance that the Bank is not investing your money in activities that contravene Shariah principles. It is therefore an excellent business tool for individuals and corporate clients both for meeting their business needs and for diversifying their investment in different foreign currencies to safeguard against currency fluctuations. Want to Pound Current Account Download, Print, Fill Form PDF version of our printed Account Opening Form is also available for download. You can print the form, fill your details and submit it along with the required documents at your preferred branch. Download Form Download Account Opening Forms Account Opening Form For Individual, Joint and Sole Proprietorship Accounts For Partnerships, Companies, Trust, Clubs, Societies & Associations Accounts Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in filling the Account Opening Form and opening your account. Locate a Branch Get Contacted Fill out the form below to be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. Get Contacted MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
